raw_response: The Sony WH-1000XM5 headphones are an excellent choice for office work due to their industry-leading noise cancellation and comfortable over-ear design. With a battery life of up to 30 hours, you won't need frequent recharges during long workdays. The LDAC codec ensures high-quality sound, enhancing your audio experience. Although they are slightly more expensive, the superior quality justifies the price for those who value top-tier performance and comfort in their headphones.
